title: J.M. Smucker (SJM) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value model for J.M. Smucker utilizing a discounted cash flow methodology with estimated assumptions for a steady consumer defensive company.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: Estimated FCF growth of 0.03 representing a low-growth consumer defensive trajectory.
assumptions.discountRate: Cost of equity based on a beta-adjusted rate of 0.0506.
